title: 5 Filters to Recognize God's Voice Daily
hook: Not sure if it's God or your thoughts? Run it through these 5 filters.
script: Not sure if it's God or your thoughts? Run it through these 5 filters. First, Scripture: does it line up with the Bible, never contradicting Jesus' teaching? Second, Christlike fruit: would obeying grow love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness, or self-control from Galatians 5? Third, peace with conviction: let Christ's peace rule in your heart while His Spirit pinpoints the next right step, not shame, Colossians 3:15. Fourth, wise counsel: trusted believers confirm it, Proverbs 11:14. Fifth, providence over time: doors open and good fruit appears, Matthew 7:20. Try a 60-second pause now; ask, "Holy Spirit, guide me." Then journal it for 7 days and watch for His steady clarity.

title: When God Feels Silent: 5 Filters in Real Life
hook: If God feels silent right now, watch this.
script: If God feels silent right now, watch this. Yesterday I asked, Should I reach out and apologize? I ran it through five filters. Scripture said yes, pursue reconciliation. The fruit check said love and gentleness would grow, not pride. Peace with conviction settled in my chest, not shame. I asked a wise friend, and they confirmed it with Proverbs 11:14. Then I watched providence: the person was free, the call was kind, and the outcome bore good fruit, Matthew 7:20. Try a 60-second pause today and write what you sense for seven days. God often speaks clearer than our fears.

title: Stop Overthinking: 5 Questions to Discern God's Voice
script: You may be overthinking this. Ask five yes-or-no questions to hear God more clearly. Does it agree with Scripture, never twisting what Jesus taught? Would obeying produce the fruit of the Spirit: love, joy, peace, patience and more from Galatians 5? Do I sense Christ's peace with specific conviction, as Colossians 3:15 says? Have wise, godly voices confirmed it, Proverbs 11:14? And over time, does good fruit show up, Matthew 7:20? If you get four or five yeses, move gently. If not, wait and pray. Take a 60-second pause right now, breathe, ask the Spirit to lead, and journal your sense for seven days. Clarity compounds.
